caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt, and various articles of clothing hang on racks. On-screen graphics include a circular logo with the text "THE" and a red logo that reads "REALLY HOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and reacting. He begins with a slight smile, transitions into a wider grin, and then laughs heartily, closing his eyes and leaning back slightly while gesturing with his right hand. The background and equipment remain static as the focus is on his facial expressions and movements.
